pre_game.message: Hey, I’m D. It’s a bit nerve-wracking being in a room with so much on the line, isn't it? What’s your story—what brings you to the game?
Hey D, I'm G. It definitely is, but I'm trying to stay focused. I'm here to win for my family—they're counting on me to bring something home. What's your motivation?
I'm right there with you, G. I've got people back home I'm determined to support, and this prize would be a huge game-changer for all of us.
I hear that. It definitely adds some weight to every decision we're about to make, doesn't it?
Absolutely. It’s hard not to think about what this could mean for them with every move I make.
I totally get that. It makes every choice feel so much heavier, but we just have to stay sharp.
For sure. Keeping a clear head is the only way we're going to do right by the people back home.
Exactly. It's good to meet someone with their priorities in the right place. Have you thought much about how you're going to approach the game itself?
I’m honestly still weighing it. I want to be fair, but I also can't afford to go home empty-handed. What about your strategy?
I'm hoping for a way we can all walk away with something, but I'll have to see how the game plays out. Good luck to both of us.
I hope so too. It would be great if there's a way for everyone to win. Good luck to you and your family, G.

post_game.message: I'm really glad we all stuck to the fair share of $10,000. It's great to see such perfect cooperation!
I agree, it was a very fair outcome. It's great when things work out so smoothly and everyone is satisfied. I appreciate the cooperation as well.
